frictions.description: Semantic assertions not created for messages without explicit goal/preference/pattern keywords
frictions.resolution: System correctly requires explicit pattern language like 'I want to', 'I always', 'I prefer' to trigger semantic assertion extraction

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-MEMORY-001, VAL-MEMORY-002, VAL-MEMORY-005, VAL-MEMORY-006): All PASS. PsychUpdate records created correctly with emotional state tracking and pattern detection. Semantic assertions extracted from messages containing goal/preference/pattern language. Both streaming and non-streaming endpoints create memory records properly.
